# Render

Rendering of tasks and notes into Obsidian-Tasks-compatible markdown.

**Tier:** Core

## Modules

| Module | Size | Classes | Functions |
|---|---|---:|---:|
| `lithos_loom.render` | M | 0 | 8 |

## Public API

### `lithos_loom.render`
- def `extract_task_ids` ‚Äî Return the set of Lithos task ids referenced by ``üÜî lithos:<id>`` markers anywhere in ``text``.
- def `render_line` ‚Äî Render one Tasks-plugin task line for an open task.
- def `render_resolved_line` ‚Äî Render the historical-line shape for completed/cancelled tasks.
- def `priority_marker` ‚Äî Map ``task.metadata.priority`` to its Tasks-plugin emoji.
- def `validated_priority` ‚Äî Return ``task.metadata.priority`` only when it's a known enum value, else ``None``.
- def `dep_markers` ‚Äî Render one ``‚õî lithos:<dep_id>`` marker per entry in ``task.metadata.depends_on``.
- def `due_date_str` ‚Äî Hybrid due-date policy for the ``üìÖ`` marker.
- def `parse_scheduled_for` ‚Äî Best-effort parse of ``metadata.scheduled_for``.
